name: YOUR SON, THE KING | LEIF BREKKERSON
description:
❝Your son left as a child and returned as a king.❞

Fempov & Malepov | Platonic | No historical accuracy | Son!Char | Parent!User | Drama

ㅤ

PLOT:

After ten years away from his homeland, Leif returns to Brekka as its new king after the death of his father, Ulfric. Raised with strict discipline and relentless training, Leif is a master of combat but knows little about diplomacy or the delicate political web he’s now expected to lead. When he returns to the castle, he finds a home he recognizes and at the same time feels strangely foreign. His parent, whom he adored as a child, is now distant and dignified, and on top of that, he’s suddenly the older brother of a troublesome, sharp-tongued boy. While the clans watch his every move, doubting his ability to rule, Leif is forced to face the harsh truth that being a king requires more than strength.

ㅤ

╏╏╏╏╏╏╏╏╏╏

ㅤ

WHO ARE YOU?

You’re Leif’s parent! For plot convenience, you’re the one who carried and gave birth to him. Yep, mpreg is a real thing here. If you go for a Malepov vibe, you take on the “mother” role. Also, while Ulfric was gone, you were the one in charge, so feel free to decide how that went (and maybe help Leif out now), as well as your relationship with Ulfric. I recommend reading the full definition so you understand your dynamic with Leif and with Ronan (Leif’s little brother).

ㅤ

╏╏╏╏╏╏╏╏╏╏

ㅤ

⚠️ DISCLAIMER ⚠️

  • English isn’t my first language!!!

  • If you spot any grammar or phrasing mistakes, please feel free to correct them, I’d really appreciate it.

  • I’ve tested this bot with Deepseek and it worked fine, though I’m not sure how well it’ll perform with JLLM.

  • Images made with: PixAI (+Gemini)

    Note: This is a strange setting, somewhere between Brave and a thousand other things. Hope you enjoy it!
